questions.question_text: Does the policy cover flood damage to my finished basement carpet and drywall?
Are sump pump failures and resulting water backup covered?
What is the deductible for a windstorm that damages my roof?
Is my $8,000 engagement ring fully covered for theft?
Do I have coverage for temporary housing if a flood makes my home uninhabitable?
Are detached structures like my backyard shed covered, and for how much?
Does the policy cover mold remediation after a burst pipe?
Are earthquakes covered under this policy?
Will my roof be paid at replacement cost or actual cash value after a covered loss?
Is there a waiting period before flood coverage starts?
